name: little-league-themes
description: Little League color themes — build system for VS Code, Zed, iTerm, and Ghostty

scripts.build: terrazzo build -c terrazzo.config.dark.mjs && terrazzo build -c terrazzo.config.darker.mjs && terrazzo build -c terrazzo.config.light.mjs
scripts.watch: terrazzo build -c terrazzo.config.dark.mjs --watch & terrazzo build -c terrazzo.config.darker.mjs --watch & terrazzo build -c terrazzo.config.light.mjs --watch
scripts.test: npm run build && git diff --exit-code targets/
